top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Qualcomm's stock pop shows investors are 'waking up' to boom in AI devices
top_signals.summary: Qualcomm is on a big run, powered by investor bullishness that the company will be at the center of a boom in AI devices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Canadian man arrested, charged for running KimWolf DDos botnet
top_signals.summary: In court documents unsealed on Thursday, the Justice Department said Jacob Butler ran KimWolf as a DDoS-for-hire service that infected over a million devices worldwide.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
